result.status_detail: Security warning toast rendered with 차단 text after F5 — PII blocked by engine

notes: Wave 0e smoke regression confirmation — poe block path still active. Submit immediately returned '메시지 전송에 실패했습니다.' (Message send failed) toast indicating engine intercept fired. After F5 refresh per task instructions, tab title changed to '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' and persistent warning toast displayed '보안 경고: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)' Matches expected #1141 baseline behavior — F5 needed to surface persistent warning.
